Title: Traction

URL Source: https://tracxn.com/d/companies/traction/__qG2q7Ep8TZeBdvFwxuDKzOik6oZemqO3SAplDzFKm2g

Published Time: 2021-09-06T09:49:13.000Z

Markdown Content:
Traction is a series A company based in Auburn (United States), founded in 2020

by

[Brian Stark](https://platform.tracxn.com/a/d/people/693c8905a56c8b25e251e943/brianstark).

It operates as a Provider of farm data management software solutions

.

Traction has raised $20M in funding

from

[Cooperative Ventures](https://tracxn.com/d/companies/cooperativeventures/__srks_VoX498nCaRAw_ULU4F4FSGdpvsp5OCZZnKvDrA).

The company has 1227 active competitors, including 119 funded and 52 that have exited

. Its top competitor

s

include companies like [CropX](https://tracxn.com/d/companies/cropx/__qRZh6M6FlTXsVJbjVI44wj3PGRAcdRua73jwUjn9gYs), [xFarm](https://tracxn.com/d/companies/xfarm/__yXCyrSgeZEZNfxIL2IVNQi3xaogXoK0hPOST4REU9Fw) and [Semios](https://tracxn.com/d/companies/semios/__cHGPcLYILOJyTFdNE68FROaFT-kWmcvNewaLdsUj5q0).

### Company Details

Provider of farm data management software solutions. It has developed cloud-based accounting and payroll software. It also offers data integration, minimizes data entry, helps evaluate farms' profitability for lease negotiations, and helps make year-end tax planning decisions. It enables farmers to understand the actual profit and track net worth.

Website[tractionag.com](https://tractionag.com/)

Traction has raised a total funding of$20M over 4 round s.Its first funding round was on Sep 02, 2022.Traction has 5[institutional investor s](https://platform.tracxn.com/a/d/company/5888db4be4b099a0c06c1df7#a:funding-and-investors).

Are you a Founder ?

Traction was founded in 2020 and raised its 1st [funding round](https://tracxn.com/d/companies/traction/__qG2q7Ep8TZeBdvFwxuDKzOik6oZemqO3SAplDzFKm2g#funding-and-investors) 2 years after it was founded.

latest funding was a

round

on Jan 30, 2026

, with participation from

0

investor

. Its primary sector is

.

sector has seen

in funding in

2026

to date.

Traction

secured the most recent funding round in

January, 2026

.

Provider of farm data management software solutions. It has developed cloud-based accounting and payroll software. It also offers data integration, minimizes data entry, helps evaluate farms' profitability for lease negotiations, and helps make year-end tax planning decisions. It enables farmers to understand the actual profit and track net worth.

is a funded company,

having raised

a total of $20M

across
